turns.assistant: Thanks, Karan. Could you please share your phone number as well?

turns.user: Four one six five five five one two three four.

tool_calls.result:

tool_calls.result:

- 1 x ਗਾਰਲਿਕ ਨਾਨ (Garlic Naan)

- name: Karan

turns.assistant: Alright Karan, you have one Butter Chicken with medium spice and one ਗਾਰਲਿਕ ਨਾਨ for pickup. Does everything look good to you?
